refined_objective.title: Reduce new-client time-to-value through a standardized onboarding experience
refined_objective.description: Create a consistent onboarding journey that speeds activation, improves early client confidence, and strengthens retention.

rationale: This keeps the user's onboarding intent but reframes it around business outcomes instead of a document deliverable.
smart_notes: The objective now states a clear business outcome: lower time-to-value.
The description links the work to activation and retention.
